EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPolygon2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that extend the IPolygon interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CC1F0567-2846-49E1-B4E2-74156B4D8BB8")]
public interface IPolygon2 : IPolygon, IPolycurve, ICurve, IGeometry

Parameters

Longitude double

GetConnectedComponents(int, out IPolygon)

Populates an array with polygons that represent connected components of the original. The rings of the output polygons are references to rings in the original.

void GetConnectedComponents(int numComponentsRequested, out IPolygon components)

Parameters

numComponentsRequested int
components IPolygon

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetConnectedComponents2(out IPolygon[])

Populates an array with polygons that represent connected components of the original. The rings of the output polygons are references to rings in the original.

void GetConnectedComponents2(out IPolygon[] components)

Parameters

components IPolygon[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetOutermostComponents(int, out int, out IPolygon, out bool)

Populates an array with polygons that represent outermost components of the original and all components within (islands within lakes). The rings of the output polygons are references to rings in the original.

void GetOutermostComponents(int numComponentsRequested, out int numComponentsReturned, out IPolygon components, out bool moreComponentsExist)

Parameters

numComponentsRequested int
numComponentsReturned int
components IPolygon
moreComponentsExist bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetOutermostComponents2(out IPolygon[], out bool)

Populates an array with polygons that represent outermost components of the original and all components within (islands within lakes). The rings of the output polygons are references to rings in the original.

void GetOutermostComponents2(out IPolygon[] components, out bool moreComponentsExist)

Parameters

components IPolygon[]
moreComponentsExist bool

QueryExteriorRingsEx(int, out IRing)

Returns an array of references to exterior rings, up to a maximum of the number requested.

numExteriorRingsRequested int
exteriorRings IRing

QueryInteriorRingsEx2(int, out IRing[])

Returns an array of references to rings that are interior to the specified exterior ring, up to a maximum of the number requested.

void QueryInteriorRingsEx2(int exteriorRingIndex, out IRing[] interiorRings)

Parameters

exteriorRingIndex int
interiorRings IRing[]
